gaps: Implementation must still prove automatic updates across overview, rounds, round detail, inbox, and runtime views with fixture or local no-spend checks.

Implementation must still verify reconnect, stale-state, duplicate/replayed event, and fallback polling behavior without starting model-backed rounds or mutating Hub, MCP, Kubernetes, git, or OpenSpec state.

summary: Accept. The integration branch adds a coherent OpenSpec change for replacing refresh-driven web app updates with automatic streaming or equivalent incremental delivery. The proposal, design, tasks, and web-app-hub delta spec cover the requested behavior, source-of-truth preservation, live/reconnecting/stale/failed states, idempotent timeline and inbox updates, safe fallback polling, and read-only no-spend verification. OpenSpec artifact validation passed with no errors.
